name: Weather Radar
description: Animated NOAA NEXRAD weather radar map zoomed to your location.

schema.name: location
schema.label: Location
schema.description: City name, zip/post code, or GPS coordinates (lat,lon).

schema.name: zoom
schema.label: Zoom Level
schema.description: Map zoom — lower values show a wider area.

schema.name: frames
schema.label: Animation Frames
schema.description: Number of radar scans to loop. RainViewer's free API provides about 13 past scans (~2 hours, every 10 min). Enable 'Include Forecast Frames' below to add up to 3 more (+10/+20/+30 min). Higher values are silently capped to what's available.

schema.name: frame_ms
schema.label: Milliseconds Per Frame
schema.description: Speed of the radar animation. Lower = faster.

schema.name: nowcast
schema.label: Include Forecast Frames
schema.description: Append RainViewer's short-range nowcast frames (+10/+20/+30 min predicted radar) after the historical loop.

schema.name: alerts
schema.label: Show Storm Alerts
schema.description: Overlay NWS active storm alert polygons on the map.

schema.name: refresh_minutes
schema.label: Reload Radar Every (minutes)
schema.description: How often to fetch fresh radar frames. Set to 0 to disable auto-refresh.

schema.name: loop
schema.label: Loop (stay on screen)
schema.description: Keep showing the radar indefinitely without advancing.

schema.name: duration
schema.label: Duration (seconds)
schema.description: How long to show this plugin before advancing. Ignored when Loop is on.
